name: lws-spec
description: JLWS — a personal clean-slate Linked Web Storage design: core protocol (wire-compatible superset of the LWS WG WD; RFC 9728 discovery, idempotent create, path alignment, CID-shaped storage description, SSE/WebSocket notifications, WebAuthn suite, optional negotiated PoP, strict-ODRL grants, normative SSRF/threat model) + the RDF Content Transformation opt-in profile + the conformance test-vector suite (test-vectors/: 125 language-neutral cases, agentic-solid-conformance format, spec-derived verdicts, GAPS.md). LOCAL ONLY; publication gated on the maintainer.
tr: none (personal draft; W3C contribution only on the maintainer's decision)
